race.comment: The well-related OUR JEWEL (2) (half to G1 winner Divine Prophet) placed over this track and trip when resuming before maybe suffering from the dreaded second-up syndrome last time out. Strips fitter third-up from the break and maps ideally for this from gate five. Should be right there when the judge calls a halt. MISS FLEETWOOD (6) also hails from a handy family (half to G3 winner and G2 placed Rise Of The Masses) and gets 2kg off from the favourable draw. Right in this contest. BRITANNIA ROSE (14) saves her best form for this distance range and looks to have a bit of upside. Top-three commodity. COOL MUSIC (1) just missed the frame in town last time out and will find this a touch easier. Can feature in the finish. SWANFELS (13) next in line in a race with a stack of chances.
